appearanceNotes: Hispanic male pirate captain with bright reef-pirate finery, mischievous smile, and ocean-blue accents.
personalityNotes: Intelligent, mischievous, charismatic, and always watching for an angle.
relationshipSummary: Captain and confidant of First Mate Sarah. Only Ramón knows what happened in Sarah's past.
notes: Captain of the Raucous Tide, a raucous pirate ship known for lavish celebratory parties after raids and fights.

appearanceNotes: Wind-channeling first mate with composed posture and practical pirate gear touched by subtle wind-capital design.
personalityNotes: Intelligent, deeply empathic, guarded, and unwilling to discuss her past.
relationshipSummary: First mate to Captain Ramón. From the Wind Capital, but keeps it secret; only Ramón knows what happened.
notes: She refuses to talk about her past. The crew respects her because she can read a room before a storm breaks. Her secret may connect to the Wind Capital theocracy and the old leaders it overthrew.

appearanceNotes: Sharp-eyed quartermaster with shell jewelry, ledger belts, and polished brass keys.
personalityNotes: Clever, practical, and delighted by a profitable mess.
relationshipSummary: Keeps the Raucous Tide stocked and quietly knows what every crew member owes.
notes: Controls the prize ledger and party supplies. She can turn stolen cargo into a feast before sunset.

appearanceNotes: Laughing reef pirate with bright sash, curved blade, and scarred knuckles.
personalityNotes: Boisterous, loyal, impulsive, and always first over the rail.
relationshipSummary: Ramón trusts him to make noise when a fight needs chaos.
notes: Leads boarding parties and starts half the victory songs.

appearanceNotes: Small, quick lookout with wind chimes braided into her scarf.
personalityNotes: Playful, observant, and impossible to sneak up on.
relationshipSummary: Sarah quietly mentors her in wind-reading without explaining why she knows so much.
notes: Rings tiny bells before storms and before trouble.

appearanceNotes: Broad-shouldered cook with copper jaw brace and flour-dusted pirate coat.
personalityNotes: Warm, theatrical, and terrifying with a frying pan.
relationshipSummary: Feeds the crew after raids and referees celebration duels.
notes: Claims every raid deserves soup, drums, and a three-hour toast.

appearanceNotes: Dancer-musician with pearl buttons, sea-glass bracelets, and a battered concertina.
relationshipSummary: Turns every victory into a lavish shipboard celebration.
notes: Knows the songs that make enemies surrender and friends tell secrets.
